name: Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. primarily manufactures and sells butt-welding pipe fittings and high purity components in Taiwan. The company offers stainless steel butt-welding pipe fittings, such as elbows, tees, reducers, caps, stub ends, etc.; and UHP components, including high purity pipes and pipe fittings, metal gasket face seal fittings, micro butt-welding fittings, LoK-DJ compression fittings, UHP CGA/DISS fittings, diaphragm and ball valves, valve manifold boxes, and special chemical storage tanks. Its butt-welding pipe fittings are used in the areas of petrochemical, ship building, foods, sugar making, paper production, chemical engineering, agricultural chemical, dyeing, synthetic fibers, liquid chemical, gas, industries piping, construction drainage pipe fitting, etc.; and UHP components have applications in the areas of semiconductor, LCD-TFT, solar energy, LED, food industry, chemical piping, gas, liquid, construction pipe fitting, etc. Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. also exports its products to Japan, Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, France, Germany, Ireland, England, the United States, Australia, New Zealand, China, and the Gulf Region. The company was formerly known as Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Limited Company and changed its name to Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. in 1977. Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1943 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
